sourcesContent:
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import { FaMapMarkedAlt, FaGlobeAsia, FaBook, FaChartLine, FaArrowRight, FaPlane, FaCompass, FaRoute } from 'react-icons/fa'; import './LandingPage.css'; const features = [ { icon: , title: 'India Map Dashboard', desc: 'Interactive map to track every state and union territory you\'ve visited across India.' }, { icon: , title: 'World Map Explorer', desc: 'Pin countries on the world map and build your global travel portfolio.' }, { icon: , title: 'Travel Journal', desc: 'Log destinations, mark favorites, and track your exploration progress by region.' }, { icon: , title: 'Travel Statistics', desc: 'Beautiful analytics showing your travel patterns, milestones, and achievements.' }, ]; const stats = [ { value: '36', label: 'States & UTs' }, { value: '195+', label: 'Countries' }, { value: '1000+', label: 'Destinations' }, ]; export default function LandingPage() { const navigate = useNavigate(); const [scrollY, setScrollY] = useState(0); useEffect(() => { const token = localStorage.getItem('token'); if (token) navigate('/dashboard'); }, [navigate]); useEffect(() => { const handleScroll = () => setScrollY(window.scrollY); window.addEventListener('scroll', handleScroll, { passive: true }); return () => window.removeEventListener('scroll', handleScroll); }, []); return (
{/* Navigation */}
50 ? 'scrolled' : ''}`}>
TravelTracker
{/* Hero Section */}
Your Travel Companion

Track Your Journeys
Across India & The World

Visualize your travels on interactive maps, journal your adventures, and watch your exploration progress grow with beautiful analytics.

{stat.value}
{stat.label}
))}
{/* Animated SVG Globe */} {/* Floating cards */}
12 States Visited
5 Countries
{/* Features Section */}

Everything You Need to
Track Your Adventures

Powerful features designed for the modern traveler

{features.map((f, i) => (
{f.icon}

{f.title}

{f.desc}

))}
{/* How It Works */}

How It Works

Get started in three simple steps

1

Create Account

Sign up for free and set up your travel profile in seconds.

2

Mark Visited Places

Click on states and countries on interactive maps to track your travels.

3

Track Progress

Watch your stats grow, unlock milestones, and plan your next adventure.

{/* CTA Section */}

Ready to Map Your Adventures?

Join thousands of travelers tracking their journeys

{/* Footer */}
TravelTracker

Built with love for travelers everywhere

); }
